prompt: A minimalist architectural photograph of a long terracotta-colored colonnade with exactly 2 parallel rows of massive cylindrical columns receding into the distance, creating a strong one-point perspective toward a small dark rectangular doorway centered at the far end. Warm late-afternoon sunlight enters from the right side, casting dramatic long horizontal shadow bands across the pale stone floor, with alternating stripes of light and shadow stretching across the entire corridor. The walls, ceiling, and columns are all rendered in warm earthy clay and sandstone tones, with smooth matte surfaces and subtle texture. Compose the scene symmetrically but slightly offset so a single oversized foreground column dominates the left edge, while the repeating columns on the right form a rhythmic pattern. No people, no furniture, no decoration, no plants. Quiet monumental modernist architecture, serene and austere, high contrast, cinematic natural light, ultra-clean lines, photorealistic, sharp detail, wide horizontal framing.
